creator: james.wright@digital-chaos.com
text:
(In reply to a52ca063 from comment #57)
A good question, I've been using the attached patch (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=241239) for running IntelliJ 2023.1 since it was created in April without issues... Unfortunately it's now pretty much out of date and IntelliJ has moved on to 2023.3.2! :-(
